title: Water Memoryless Property as EML-inf

analysis.object: T541: Water Memoryless Property as EML-inf depth analysis

markov_property.description: Turbulent flow is Markovian: no memory of past states; structurally memoryless
markov_property.reason: Memoryless = EML-inf: the state space is uncountably infinite at each instant

each_eddy.description: Each turbulent eddy contains the full hierarchy: EML-0 core to EML-inf boundary
each_eddy.reason: Self-similar turbulence: every eddy is a micro-exhibition of full depth

viscous_regularization.description: Viscosity is the firewall against depth-inf eruption; regularizes EML-3 to EML-2
viscous_regularization.reason: Viscosity is depth reducer: EML-3 -> EML-2; prevents EML-inf physical blow-up

analysis.theorem: T541: Water Memoryless Property as EML-inf (S820).

key_theorem: T541: Water Memoryless Property as EML-inf (S820).
